description: Create a multi-page operational report named 'Operational_Report' using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. The workbook must include a canvas named 'Revenue Overview' containing a Stacked Bar Chart of 'Revenue' by 'Product Category' colored by 'Customer Segment', and a second canvas named 'Shipping Performance' containing a table showing 'Ship Mode' as rows with 'Order ID' (Count) and 'Discount' (Average) as measures. Save the workbook to the Documents folder.
